title: Angel and Sinner
writer: Guy de Maupassant, Henri Jeanson, Louis d'Hee
actors: Micheline Presle, Berthe Bovy, Louise Conte
plot: Ten people fleeing Rouen invaded by the Prussians, Rousset nicknamed ball of tallow among them, give to a Prussian to save other passengers who still despise. However, on later nobody could underestimate her being how brave .
